_comment: Negative fixture for PRD-103-R7 in the runtime profile. The producer derived the etag from the (payload, identity, tenant, request_id) quadruple instead of the (payload, identity, tenant) triple defined in PRD-103-R6. This makes the etag unique per request, which (a) defeats If-None-Match revalidation entirely, and (b) silently leaks correlation surface. Replica-A and replica-B will produce different etags for the same content+identity+tenant. Detected by a probe that issues two requests in succession and observes the etag change with no underlying content change.

expected_finding.missing: runtime etag derivation included a per-request nonce (request_id); two consecutive requests for the same (payload, identity, tenant) triple produced different etags
